ns0:entry.ns0:title: EmenstaNougat/ESP32-BlueJammer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/EmenstaNougat/ESP32-BlueJammer
Language: unknown
The ESP32-BlueJammer (Bluetooth jammer, BLE jammer, WiFi jammer, RC jammer) disrupts 2.4GHz communications. Using an ESP32 and nRF24 modules, it generates noise and unnecessary packets, causing interference between the devices communicating, making them unable to work as intended. Ideal for controlled disruption and security testing.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Seeed-Projects/reBot-DevArm

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ashishpatel26/500-AI-Agents-Projects
Language: unknown
The 500 AI Agents Projects is a curated collection of AI agent use cases across various industries. It showcases practical applications and provides links to open-source projects for implementation, illustrating how AI agents are transforming sectors such as healthcare, finance, education, retail, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills
Language: unknown
A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
